name: URL Summarizer
description: Summarize web pages, articles, YouTube videos, and other URLs using AI — powered by the summarize CLI

configSchema.label: AI Provider
configSchema.description: Which AI provider to use for summarization. Uses your existing API key from the vault.

configSchema.label: Model Override
configSchema.description: Specific model to use (e.g. gemini-2.5-flash, gpt-4o-mini). Leave blank for provider default.

configSchema.label: Default Summary Length
configSchema.description: Default length for summaries (short ~900 chars, medium ~1800, long ~4200)
